title: Ora Toolbar Pack v1.0
description: Phase 7 customization-pack format per Visual Intelligence Implementation Plan §11.4 / §11.8 / §11.15 and the canonical spec at vault/Reference — Toolbar Pack Format.md. A pack is a single JSON file bundling toolbars, macros, prompt templates, and composition templates so customizations travel without code review. additionalProperties:false at every level enforces the §11.15 declarative-only baseline — unknown fields fail validation, eliminating smuggle-via-unknown-field attacks. This schema covers structural shape only; Lucide name resolution, inline-SVG well-formedness, and binding-target existence are enforced by pack-validator.js (semantic layer).

pack_name.description: Human-readable name shown in install dialogs and switcher UI (spec §3).

ora_compatibility.description: Semver range string (e.g. '>=0.7.0', '^0.7.0', '0.7.0 - 0.9.0') describing which Ora versions this pack supports (spec §3, §11). The pack loader rejects packs whose range excludes the running Ora version.

description.description: One-sentence description shown in the install dialog (spec §3).

toolbars.description: Toolbars defined or modified by this pack (spec §4).

macros.description: Macros provided by this pack (spec §6). Linear-only — no conditionals, no loops, no flow control — per §11.15 of the plan.

prompt_templates.description: Prompt templates provided by this pack (spec §7). Mustache syntax: {{name}} variable, {{name|default}} default value.

composition_templates.description: Composition templates provided by this pack (spec §8). Each carries a canvas-state payload describing a starter composition.

id_string.description: Lowercase kebab-case identifier (spec §4). Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens only; must begin with a letter or digit.

icon_string.description: Either a Lucide name (lowercase kebab-case matching the canonical name list at server/static/vendor/lucide/names.json) or an inline SVG string starting with '<svg' (spec §9). pack-validator.js cross-references Lucide names via OraIconResolver.isValidName and verifies inline SVGs start with '<svg' / are well-formed XML / declare a viewBox attribute. URLs, base64-encoded raster images, and other shapes are rejected per §9.

binding_string.description: Three-form binding (spec §5): 'tool:<tool_id>' invokes a built-in tool, 'capability:<slot_name>' invokes a capability slot per Reference — Capability Invocation Contracts, 'macro:<macro_id>' invokes a macro defined in this or a previously installed pack. The pack loader (WP-7.2.1) verifies the target exists; this schema enforces the surface form only.

shortcut_string.description: Keyboard shortcut per spec §12 Q15 conventions. Free-form here; the toolbar registry enforces single-letter / modifier-letter conventions at install time.

predicate_string.description: Enabled-state predicate (e.g. 'selection_active', 'image_present'). Free-form string; meaningful values are interpreted by the toolbar registry.

dock_enum.description: Default toolbar dock (spec §4). Default applied by the renderer is 'left'.

icon_size_enum.description: Default icon size (spec §4). Default applied by the renderer is 'medium'.

toolbar_item.description: One tool item within a toolbar (spec §4).

macro.description: One macro (spec §6). Linear-only by design — no conditionals, no loops, no flow control — per §11.15.

shortcut.description: Keyboard shortcut. May be null per spec §6 example.

macro_step.description: One macro step (spec §6). Carries exactly one of 'tool' or 'capability' (oneOf) plus an optional params object. params values may reference variables with Mustache syntax {{name}}; the macro runtime collects undefined variables and prompts the user before execution.

params.description: Free-form parameter bag. Values may be primitives or arrays of primitives; structure is target-tool-specific. Mustache references {{name}} resolve at execution time.

prompt_template.description: One prompt template (spec §7). Must declare exactly one of 'gear_preference' (text-output route) or 'capability_route' (image-output route) per §7.

slash_command.description: Including the leading '/'. Lowercase kebab-case after the slash.

prompt_variable.description: One declared template variable (spec §7). 'options' required when type=enum.

composition_template.description: One composition template (spec §8). canvas_state is a free-form object whose precise shape is defined by canvas-state.schema.json (WP-7.0.2); structural validation against that schema is delegated to pack-validator.js so the two schemas stay loosely coupled.

thumbnail.description: Optional inline SVG shown in the New Canvas dialog. Same icon_string semantic as toolbar icons; pack-validator.js verifies it begins with '<svg', is well-formed XML, and declares a viewBox.

canvas_state.description: Canvas-state payload per WP-7.0.2 (canvas-state.schema.json). May include placeholder regions — objects with 'placeholder: true' — the user is expected to replace.
